name: Main Vegetable Market
description: The town's main daily market for fresh vegetables, fruits and greens sourced from nearby farms. Best prices are early in the morning.

name: Weekly Santhe (Market Day)
description: The lively weekly santhe where farmers and traders from surrounding villages gather to sell produce, grains, utensils and household goods. A great glimpse of local life.

name: Flower & Pooja Market
description: Fresh flowers, garlands and pooja items right beside the temple entrance. Vendors here supply jasmine, marigold and lotus for daily worship and festivals.

name: Fish & Meat Market
description: Fresh fish, chicken and mutton from local suppliers. Open mainly in the mornings — arrive early for the best and freshest stock.
